en: Are we really friends? Why not?
ko: 너를 위해서, 브라이언. 우리가 정말 친구일까? 왜 안 되지?

en: I mean, because friends can tell each other anything if we have our friends hats on, right?
ko: 친구는 서로에게 무엇이든 말할 수 있으니까.

en: I think so. All right. I'll tell you why you don't have your $10 million yet.
ko: 네가 1천만 달러를 아직 못 받은 이유를 말해줄게.

en: Right now, you are a paycheck player.
You play with your head, not your heart. And your personal life, heart.
But when you get on the field, it's all about what you didn't get,
who's to blame, who underthrew the pass, who's got the contract you don't, who's not giving you your love.
And you know what? That is not what inspires people.
That is not what inspires people. Just shut up.
Play the game. Play it from your heart. And you know what?
ko: 그건 사람들을 감동시키지 않아. 그냥 입 다물고, 게임을 해. 마음으로 해. 그리고 알겠니?

en: I will show you the Kwan. And that's the truth, man.
ko: 그게 진실이야, 친구. 그게 진실이야. 감당할 수 있어?

en: That's the truth. Can you handle it? It's just a question between friends.
You know? Oh, and when they call you shrimp,
ko: 아, 그리고 누가 너를 새우라고 부를 때,

en: I'm the one who defends you. I want to defend something.
Fine. And quit using that word, Kwan.
ko: 뭔가를 방어하고 싶어. 좋아. 그리고 나를 이용하지 마.
